what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment record that associates an attachment identifier with a board item target in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter delimited by ---
It declares id att-56060da2, channel dragnet-development, attachment_type board_items, target board://item-eb5d71e7, and an added timestamp
There is no body content or code symbols
The target is expressed as a board:// URI
standouts: target references a board item via URI board://item-eb5d71e7
notes: A bare attachment metadata stub linking att-56060da2 to board item item-eb5d71e7 in dragnet-development.
purpose_vs_actual: The stated metadata fields describe a link to a board item, which matches the file's content.
intention_signals: It appears intended to record that a specific attachment was added to a specific board item in a channel at a precise time.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed association between a channel attachment and a board item that supports lookup, provenance, and cross-referencing.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-only channel attachment metadata file linking attachment att-56060da2 in dragnet-development to board item item-eb5d71e7 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record when and how an attachment was attached to a board item in a development channel.
